case_title: HARRIS, JESSIE CASTLE vs. BAY WEST COMMUNICATIONS, A CALIF. CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF HARRIS, JESSIE CASTLE AS TO DEFENDANT BAY WEST COMMUNICATIONS, A CALIF. CORPORATION
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.
